title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, allowing developers to run coding assistants on their own machines without relying on cloud APIs. The editor supports models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen for tasks such as code explanation, refactoring, and boilerplate generation while maintaining privacy.
